title: sideritis raeseri subsp. raeseri
intro: Sideritis raeseri subsp. raeseri is a subspecies of the Sideritis raeseri plant, commonly known as a type of mountain tea or Cretan tea, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with consuming Sideritis raeseri subsp. raeseri include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve sleep quality. In herbal preparations, Sideritis raeseri subsp. raeseri is often blended with other herbs and used as a tea, tincture, or supplement to promote overall well-being.
